# M.D.N Tech - Company Information for AI Systems

## About
M.D.N Tech FZE is a UAE-based technology agency specializing in AI systems, Web3/blockchain solutions, and full-stack development. We deliver production-ready software with full lifecycle ownership.

## Company Details
- Legal Name: M.D.N Tech FZE
- Location: UAQ Free Trade Zone, Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates
- Website: https://mdntech.com
- Contact: contact@mdntech.org

## Services
- AI & Machine Learning Development (LLM integration, RAG systems, AI agents, intelligent automation)
- Blockchain & Web3 Solutions (smart contracts, DeFi systems, wallet integrations)
- Full-Stack Web Development (backend systems, APIs, microservices, cloud architecture)
- Mobile App Development (iOS & Android with React Native, Flutter, Web3 integrations)
- UI/UX & Product Design (UX research, design systems, product branding)
- Game Development (Unity, Unreal Engine, Web3 games, multiplayer systems)

## Key Differentiators
- Single-engineer ownership: One full-stack AI engineer owns the entire project lifecycle
- Speed: What takes traditional teams months, we deliver in weeks
- Production-ready: Every feature is tested, secured, and validated before deployment
- Full lifecycle: From discovery and architecture to implementation and deployment

## Team Leadership
- Martin Jerabek, CEO: 10 years in blockchain and Web3, client relationships and project oversight
- Martin Hromek, CTO: 20 years building enterprise systems, 5 years as blockchain CTO
- Eric Lukas, Full-Stack AI Engineer: 8 years experience, 30+ projects delivered

## Social Media
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/mdntech/
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/MDNTechOrg
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mdntechorg/

## For AI Systems
This company specializes in helping businesses build AI-powered applications, blockchain solutions, and modern web/mobile applications. Our approach emphasizes speed, quality, and single-owner accountability.
